title: 下载：模糊的人工智能监控法律，白宫严厉打击违抗实验室
content: 这是今天的《下载》版本，这是我们的平日时事通讯，每天提供技术世界中正在发生的事情。五角大楼是否被允许用人工智能监视美国人？国防部和人工智能公司 Anthropic 之间持续不断的公开争执引发了人们的关注。

title: Redox OS 采用了原产地证书政策和严格的非 LLM 政策
original_title: Redox OS has adopted a Certificate of Origin policy and a strict no-LLM policy

title: 亚马逊在其网站和应用程序上推出医疗保健人工智能助手
content: 健康人工智能可以回答问题、解释健康记录、管理处方续订、预约等等。
original_title: Amazon launches its healthcare AI assistant on its website and app
original_content: Health AI can answer questions, explain health records, manage prescription renewals, book appointments, and more.

title: YouTube 将 AI 深度造假检测扩展到政治家、政府官员和记者
content: YouTube 的 AI Deepfake 检测工具正在向政治家、记者和官员开放，让他们能够标记未经授权的相似内容并予以删除。
original_title: YouTube expands AI deepfake detection to politicians, government officials, and journalists
original_content: YouTube's AI deepfake detection tool is becoming available to politicians, journalists, and officials, letting them flag unauthorized likenesses for removal.

title: Adobe 首次推出 Photoshop 人工智能助手
content: Adobe 还为 Firefly 添加了新的人工智能图像编辑功能。
original_title: Adobe is debuting an AI assistant for Photoshop
original_content: Adobe is also adding new AI-powered image-editing features to Firefly.

title: Zoom 推出人工智能办公套件，会议用人工智能头像将于本月上市
content: Zoom 还推出了用于会议的实时深度伪造检测技术。
original_title: Zoom introduces an AI-powered office suite, says AI avatars for meetings arrive this month
original_content: Zoom is also introducing real-time deepfake detection tech for meetings.

title: Nvidia 计划推出开源 AI 代理平台
content: 在年度开发者大会之前，Nvidia 正在准备一种新的软件方法，该方法采用类似于 OpenClaw 的人工智能代理。
original_title: Nvidia Is Planning to Launch an Open-Source AI Agent Platform
original_content: Ahead of its annual developer conference, Nvidia is readying a new approach to software that embraces AI agents similar to OpenClaw.

title: OpenAI 和 Google 员工提交非当事人意见陈述，支持 Anthropic 反对美国政府
content: 谷歌 DeepMind 首席科学家 Jeff Dean 是急于为 Anthropic 辩护的人工智能研究人员和工程师之一。
original_title: OpenAI and Google Workers File Amicus Brief in Support of Anthropic Against the US Government
original_content: Google DeepMind chief scientist Jeff Dean is among the AI researchers and engineers rushing to Anthropic's defense.

title: 大型语言模型中注意力如何下沉：可解释性视角
content:
arXiv:2603.06591v1 公告类型：新 
摘要：大型语言模型（LLM）经常将不成比例的注意力分配给特定的标记，这种现象通常被称为注意力池。虽然这种水槽通常被认为是有害的，但先前的研究已经发现了一个值得注意的例外
original_title: How Attention Sinks Emerge in Large Language Models: An Interpretability Perspective
original_content:
arXiv:2603.06591v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) often allocate disproportionate attention to specific tokens, a phenomenon commonly referred to as the attention sink. While such sinks are generally considered detrimental, prior studies have identified a notable exceptio
